languages.text: Cette arme redoutable inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}dégâts mentaux{/g} à tous les ennemis autour de la cible principale et applique l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}Fusion{/g} pendant 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g} aux cibles {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touchées{/g}.

languages.text: Bu ürkütücü silah, ana hedefin etrafındaki tüm düşmanlara {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}zihinsel hasar{/g} verir ve {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vuruş{/g} hâlinde {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}eritme{/g} etkisi oluşturur. Bu etki 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.

traits.locale_text: Bu ürkütücü silah, ana hedefin etrafındaki tüm düşmanlara {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}zihinsel hasar{/g} verir ve {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vuruş{/g} hâlinde {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}eritme{/g} etkisi oluşturur. Bu etki 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.

languages.text: 这把骇人的武器会对主目标周围的所有敌人造成{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神伤害{/g}，{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}时施加{g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}熔化{/g}效果，持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。

languages.text: Esta temible arma inflige {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}daño mental{/g} a todos los enemigos situados en torno al objetivo principal, causando {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}derretimiento{/g} durante 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g} si {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacta{/g}.
languages.original_text: This fearsome weapon deals {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g} to all enemies around the main target, inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}melting{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g} on {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Esta temible arma inflige {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}daño mental{/g} a todos los enemigos situados en torno al objetivo principal, causando {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}derretimiento{/g} durante 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g} si {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacta{/g}.

languages.text: Diese Furcht erregende Waffe fügt allen Gegnern in der Umgebung des Hauptziels {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}Mentalschaden{/g} zu und belegt sie im Falle eines {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffers{/g} 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang mit {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}Schmelzen{/g}.
languages.original_text: This fearsome weapon deals {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g} to all enemies around the main target, inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}melting{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g} on {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Diese Furcht erregende Waffe fügt allen Gegnern in der Umgebung des Hauptziels {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}Mentalschaden{/g} zu und belegt sie im Falle eines {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffers{/g} 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang mit {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}Schmelzen{/g}.

languages.text: この恐ろしい武器は、メインターゲットの周囲の敵全員に{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神ダメージ{/g}を与え、{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}した敵を2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間{g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}溶解{/g}状態にする。
